literal_meaning: Bitter, sour, salty, very hot, sharp, dry, burning foods, dear to the rajasic person, produce pain, grief and sickness.
contextual_meaning: Foods that overstimulate the nervous system and inflame the body-mind are chosen by those dominated by restless ambition; they seed future distress.
anchor_text: Rajasic foods overstimulate body-mind, breeding pain, grief, disease.
psychological_state: Hyper-arousal and compulsive craving masking inner emptiness.
trigger_scenario: Reaching for spicy take-out while exhausted, chasing temporary buzz.
